name: 最大连续Sleep Max Consecutive Sleep
desc: Mild waiting — 8 sleeps total, mostly interleaved with get_session_output polls; only one back-to-back sleep+check_session_idle pair (length 2) on session 'fast_visual_processing'.

steps.t: Steps 72,74,76,78: sleep → get_session_output cycle on visual_reasoning_processing
Step 95: get_session_output breaks the run (length-1 only)
Step 96-97: sleep → check_session_idle — longest wait run = 2
Action mix: list_files×27, run_command×27, sleep×8, check_session_idle×2
